topic: Build an AI Test Generator with GPT-5 in 2026: Step-by-Step Guide

competitors.title: GPT-5 in Action: Building Autonomous Code-Generating Agents | Markaicode
key_points: GPT-5 can create complete, functional code systems with minimal human supervision
Autonomous agents plan, write, test, and refine entire applications from natural language instructions
Agent configuration includes test_generation: true for automated test creation
Step-by-step guide for setting up GPT-5 code agent environment with Python 3.10+, GPT-5 API, and required packages
Workflow includes requirement analysis, architecture planning, code generation, test creation, and documentation

competitors.title: GPT-5 Coding Examples - OpenAI GitHub Repository
key_points: Repository contains demo applications generated entirely in a single GPT-5 or GPT-5.2 prompt
Examples showcase model's strengths in scaffolding websites, front-end apps, games, and interactive UIs
Includes configuration options for test generation in agent setup
Codex CLI recommended for seamless coding experience with GPT-5 for generating and previewing code

competitors.title: GPT-5 prompting guide - OpenAI Cookbook
key_points: GPT-5 represents a substantial leap in agentic task performance, coding, raw intelligence, and steerability
Focus on improving tool calling, instruction following, and long-context understanding for agentic applications
Responses API recommended for agentic workflows where reasoning persists between tool calls
Prompting tips for maximizing coding performance and controlling agentic eagerness
